keyEvents.text: Goal!  Curaçao 1, Trinidad and Tobago 0. Rangelo Janga (Curaçao) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Brandley Kuwas with a through ball   following a fast break.
Goal!  Curaçao 2, Trinidad and Tobago 0. Godfried Roemeratoe (Curaçao) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kenji Gorré.
First Half ends, Curaçao 2, Trinidad and Tobago 0.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Kristian Lee-Him replaces Michel Poon-Angeron.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Kareem Moses replaces Kaïlé Auvray.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. André Raymond replaces Ross Russell Jr..
Goal!  Curaçao 3, Trinidad and Tobago 0. Kenji Gorré (Curaçao) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Curaçao 3, Trinidad and Tobago 1. Reon Moore (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ryan Telfer.
Substitution, Curaçao. Joshua Zimmerman replaces Kenji Gorré.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Real Gill replaces Ryan Telfer because of an injury.
Goal!  Curaçao 3, Trinidad and Tobago 2. Kristian Lee-Him (Trinidad and Tobago) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Penalty saved. Brandley Kuwas (Curaçao)  left footed shot saved  in the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Curaçao 4, Trinidad and Tobago 2. Juninho Bacuna (Curaçao) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Curaçao 5, Trinidad and Tobago 2. Rangelo Janga (Curaçao) header from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner    following a corner.
